nasb.text: The broken horn and the four horns that arose in its place represent four kingdoms which will arise from his nation, although not with his power.

esv.text: As for the horn that was broken, in place of which four others arose, four kingdoms shall arise from his nation, but not with his power.

cnv.text: 至於代替那折斷了的角，在牠原來的地方長出來的四個角，就是四個要從他的國中興起的王國，只是沒有他的權勢。

ccb.text: 大角折断后，从原处长出四个角表示四个国必从这国兴起，但都不及这国强大。
